prompt:
Create a clean black-line-art medical instruction illustration in the universal patient-information-leaflet style: uniform medium-weight black ink lines on pure white background, minimal short parallel hatching only for soft shadow / volume on hands and curved surfaces, no color except red blood inside a vial in the left state, no frame, no border, no captions, no labels other than the embossed text on the tube, no logos, no numbers, no other accent elements.

=== COMPOSITION ===
A 1:1 square DUAL-STATE composition arranged side-by-side. LEFT STATE on the left half, a curved black ARROW pointing right in the middle, RIGHT STATE on the right half.

=== THE PROTECTOR TUBE — LOCKED ANCHOR ===
The protector tube in BOTH states MUST be a faithful line-art reproduction of the protector tube shown in the FIRST provided reference image. Match it EXACTLY:
  • Tube shape: stubby pill-bottle silhouette, total assembled height ≈ 1.3x its diameter, short and chunky like a fat lip-balm canister.
  • Cap and body share the SAME WIDE DIAMETER — when assembled they form one continuous cylinder of uniform width, with only a thin horizontal seam line where they meet. NO step, NO narrowing at the cap/body junction.
  • BLACK CAP — short squat solid-black cylinder, cap height ≈ 0.5x diameter (much wider than tall).
  • WHITE BODY — slightly taller white cylinder, body height ≈ 0.9x diameter, same diameter as the cap.
  • Embossed text on the cap: 'DIALED' running top-to-bottom along the cap's vertical axis, with the FIRST D at the very TOP of the cap and the LAST D at the bottom just above the cap/body seam. Each letter rotated 90° book-spine style (sideways), thin WHITE outline strokes against the solid-black cap fill (line-art embossed, letter interior remains black).
  • Embossed text on the body: 'HEALTH' running top-to-bottom along the body's vertical axis, with the FIRST H at the TOP of the body (just below the cap/body seam) and the LAST H at the bottom near the base. Each letter rotated 90° book-spine style — SAME rotation direction as the DIALED letters (both words readable with the same head-tilt). Thin BLACK outline strokes against the white body (line-art embossed, letter interior remains white).
  • Reading the assembled tube top-down: DIALED (cap) → HEALTH (body) = 'DIALED HEALTH' linearly top-down, both words spelled forward with the same head-tilt orientation.

The protector tube in your output must match the FIRST reference EXACTLY. Both states' tube must use this same locked tube shape, same locked text orientation, same proportions.

=== LEFT STATE ===
Just the WHITE PROTECTOR TUBE BODY by itself (no cap yet) — same body proportions as in the FIRST reference, with HEALTH embossed in the correct orientation (first H at the top, last H at the bottom, book-spine sideways letters). The body's open mouth at the top is exposed. A hand from the UPPER-LEFT of the frame holds a tall narrow capped blood-filled GLASS VIAL — transparent tube partially filled with RED BLOOD (~70% full), plain ribbed black-line-art cap on top — and lowers the vial DOWN into the body's open mouth. The vial's lower portion sits inside the body's mouth; the upper portion (with cap) extends above. RED BLOOD is the only color in the entire composition.

=== MIDDLE: ARROW ===
A SOLID BLACK CURVED ARROW arching from the left state's area to the right state's area, pointing right, centered vertically between the two states.

=== RIGHT STATE ===
The ASSEMBLED upright protector tube — same WHITE BODY as the LEFT state (same proportions, same correctly-oriented HEALTH text), with the BLACK CAP (from the FIRST reference) placed on top. Cap and body diameters match exactly. DIALED embossed on the cap in the correct orientation (first D at top, last D at bottom). A hand from the UPPER-RIGHT of the frame pinches the cap between thumb and fingers and lowers it onto the body (or has just placed it). The blood-filled vial is now seated INSIDE the body, faintly visible through the body's open mouth — just a hint of red below the cap.

Reading top-down on the assembled tube in the RIGHT state: BLACK CAP showing DIALED forward → WHITE BODY showing HEALTH forward = 'DIALED HEALTH' linearly top-down.

=== STYLE ===
Uniform medium-weight black ink line work on pure white background. Minimal short parallel hatching only for shadow / volume on hands and curved cylindrical surfaces. The only color in the entire composition is the RED BLOOD inside the vial in the left state. 1:1 square composition. Both states sit at roughly the same vertical position with the arrow centered between them. Generous clean white margins around the composition. Drawn-by-hand line work, clean and crisp.

No frame, no border, no caption, no labels beyond the embossed DIALED on the cap and HEALTH on the body, no logos, no numbers, no other accent objects.
